h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner repeatedly asks for confirmation of the pairs while stating they still feel shaky about the conceptual distinction.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor provides additional checks and rule lines but does not fundamentally change the instructional route or introduce a new public mechanism to address the learner's persistent conceptual block.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor provides additional checks and rule lines but does not fundamentally change the instructional route or introduce a new public mechanism to address the learner's persistent conceptual block.
